user.title: smartENERGY Strompreishelfer
user.description: Fetches the tariff prices from smartENERGY (smartTIMES or smartCONTROL). No API key is required.

data_description.tariff: smartTIMES: time-based tariff. smartCONTROL: linked to the EPEX spot market price; a handling fee of 1.2 ct/kWh net (1.44 ct/kWh gross) is added on top.
data_description.grid_zone: Determines the grid fees (grid level 7, quarter-hourly metering) in the total price. "No grid area" leaves them out.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the smartENERGY API.

data_description.tariff: smartTIMES: time-based tariff. smartCONTROL: linked to the EPEX spot market price; a handling fee of 1.2 ct/kWh net (1.44 ct/kWh gross) is added on top.
data_description.grid_zone: Determines the grid fees (grid level 7, quarter-hourly metering) in the total price. "No grid area" leaves them out.

user.title: Add cheap-hour sensor
user.description: Create a sensor for one appliance. It is on while the current hour is among the cheapest of the day.

data_description.cheap_mode: "Cheapest individual hours": the cheapest quarter-hours of the day — they may be spread across the day (e.g. boiler, wallbox). "Consecutive block": a single cheapest window in one piece — for appliances with a fixed run time that must not be interrupted (washing machine, dishwasher).

"Cheapest individual hours": the cheapest quarter-hours of the day — they may be spread across the day (e.g. boiler, wallbox). "Consecutive block": a single cheapest window in one piece — for appliances with a fixed run time that must not be interrupted (washing machine, dishwasher).

options.none: No grid area (don't include grid fees)
